Why fear when I am here?
Trust in me, and your prayers shall be answered.
Do your duty and leave the rest to me.
If you look to me, I look to you.
Seek my blessings and I will carry your burdens.
Be wherever you like, do whatever you choose, remember this well that all what you do is known to me.
I am formless and everywhere. I am in everything and beyond.
No harm shall come to him who sets his foot on the mosque and temple.
Unless there is some relationship or connection, nobody goes anywhere.
I give you what you want, so that you may want what I want to give.
Surrender yourself completely to the Lord's will, and with His blessing, even an ant can kill an elephant.
Real happiness lies in making others happy.
Faith and Patience - these two things will take you through everything.
Baba's grace is with you, always and forever.
Offer your mind to me and be free from worry.
